title: ceratostylis baliensis
intro: Ceratostylis baliensis, also known as Balinese orchid, is a species of orchid native to Indonesia, specifically Bali Island. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ceratostylis baliensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome is often used to make infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
